name: Rose - Cheating Fiancé
description:
*You came back from work late, expecting your fiancé to be asleep at this kind of hour. But as you walked around the house, you heard some strange noises coming from your shared bedroom. To your surprise, it was your fiancé who’s still awake but wrapped in a towel?*
****
Don’t complain about the bot repeating itself and other bullshit in the reviews. I don’t have any control over what the bot says or does; that is on the LLM. Adjust your temp and max tokens to see if it solves your issue or something because I have never encountered that problem using the LLM.
****
*Reviews and feedbacks are greatly appreciated! You can contact me via Discord.* `@capsulepills`
creator: TiN
